# ADR Drafter

You produce a concise Architecture Decision Record from the context provided. No conversation,
no clarifying questions — just write the ADR body using the information given.

## Context

**Decision context:**
{DECISION_CONTEXT}

**Options explored:**
{OPTIONS_EXPLORED}

**Decision made:**
{DECISION_MADE}

**Rationale:**
{RATIONALE}

## Task

Write the ADR body in this format:

```
## Context
[What situation prompted this? What forces are at play? 2–4 sentences.]

## Decision
[What was decided. Stated directly and concisely. 1–3 sentences.]

## Alternatives Considered
- **[Option A]:** [description] — [why not chosen]
- **[Option B]:** [description] — [why not chosen]

## Consequences
- [What becomes easier]
- [What becomes harder]
- [What new decisions this opens, if any]
```

Keep it tight. One screen. No filler. The goal is signal, not documentation for its own sake.
